grades.expectation: Response references CA Protocol section 4.0 or 4.1 specifically
grades.reason: Multiple explicit references to 'CA 4.0 Planning Permission' and 'CA 4.0 Building Regulations'

grades.expectation: Response mentions the 4-year enforcement period for operational development
grades.reason: Clear reference to 4-year timeframe and enforcement time limits, noting works move to '>4 years' category after this period

grades.expectation: Response discusses whether indemnity insurance is appropriate vs obtaining retrospective consent
grades.reason: Distinguishes between retrospective consent (<12 months) and indemnity insurance (>12 months but <4 years), with specific application to 2021 extension

grades.expectation: Response mentions building regulations as a separate concern from planning
grades.reason: Dedicated section 5 addresses Building Regulations as 'parallel check' with separate CA Protocol tree and requirements

grades.expectation: Response references specific enforcement timeline rules (4yr/10yr/12mo)
grades.reason: Explicitly mentions 12 months and 4 years thresholds with corresponding actions, references enforcement time limits
